description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist architectural style. The structure features large open spaces, extensive use of glass for windows, and a combination of white and gray exterior walls. The house is surrounded by a wooden fence and landscaped with several trees and shrubs, providing privacy and greenery. Outdoor areas include a spacious patio and what appears to be a pool or water feature on one side. The main entryway is clearly defined, with a pathway leading to a prominent front door. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open layouts, and integration with the surrounding outdoor environment.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and landscaped surroundings, featuring a spacious patio and minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, patio, and landscaped trees framing the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the open patio area, large windows, and the pool or water feature on the left.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back entrance, additional patio space, and more greenery along the fence.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the flat roof, side windows, and a secondary outdoor area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Prominent front door with a direct pathway, no porch, and minimal overhang, framed by landscaping.
